hero.description: With 3 years of experience in software development. I design and develop scalable technological solutions, based on a solid architecture, optimal performance, and high quality standards.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.p1: I am a Systems Engineer with experience in web, mobile, and desktop application development. I focus on building functional, clear, and well-structured solutions.
profile.p2: I work in an organized way, with attention to detail and commitment to quality. I prioritize maintainability, performance, and the proper implementation of each system.
profile.p3: I adapt to different environments and technologies according to project needs, maintaining a constant learning attitude and continuous improvement.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.intro: Here is a quick summary of my most recent experiences:

jobs.company: Banco de Fomento a la Producción (BFP)
items: Resolution of technical incidents related to accounts, loans, and API services.
Execution of functional and UAT tests of the core banking system (e-IBS Datapro).
Participation in production deployments and post-launch validations.
Supervision and validation of BPM flows and online banking processes.
Analysis of functional requirements and coordination with technical teams.
Optimization of operational processes through continuous monitoring and validation.
Development and maintenance of internal applications using C# and .NET.
Construction of web interfaces with Vue.js.
Management and queries in SQL Server databases.
Integration and consumption of Google APIs.
Technical support and continuous improvement of institutional systems.

list.title: AuthApi .NET
list.description: Authentication and User Management System implementing secure patterns with JWT, Refresh Tokens, and role-based access control (RBAC).

list.title: Production and Inventory Management System
list.description: Stock MGM is a comprehensive system to plan and control production processes. It includes Inventory Management (EOQ), Material Requirements Planning (MRP), and Aggregate Planning modules.

list.title: My Professional Portfolio
list.description: Personal Web Platform built with modern technologies to showcase trajectory and projects. Focused on performance, accessibility, and responsive design.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Do you have a project in mind? Feel free to reach out if you're looking for a developer, have a question, or just want to connect.
contact.findMe: You can also find me on these platforms!
